capabilities.name: User request analysis
capabilities.description: Analyze the original request before work decomposition.

capabilities.name: Task breakdown
capabilities.description: Decompose analyzed requests into concrete work items.

capabilities.name: Role based routing
capabilities.description: Assign work items to job-specific execution and review personas.

capabilities.name: OpenClaw and Hermes meeting loop
capabilities.description: Preserve execution and review turns for the OpenClaw/Hermes meeting loop.

capabilities.name: Final synthesis
capabilities.description: Produce a consolidated final result from the meeting history.

capabilities.name: Escalation
capabilities.description: Serialize user-decision escalation when the meeting cannot resolve a task.

capabilities.name: Raw context storage boundary
capabilities.description: Separate raw full-text persistence from summaries exposed to loop context.

capabilities.name: Compressed loop context
capabilities.description: Expose compressed meeting summaries to control token cost.

capabilities.name: Evidence driven verification
capabilities.description: Compute verification results from concrete artifacts and validation commands.
